strengths: 20 years of polyglot engineering experience across web, embedded, mobile, and infrastructure — exceeds the 15-year minimum
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Genuine entrepreneurial track record: founded GISCollective (open-source geo-platform, still active), early-stage startup experience at WatchUp and Apon
concerns: AI expertise is nascent — confined to ~2 months at re:cinq; no demonstrated AI products or platforms built at scale across the career
Cloud platform depth is thin — AWS CDK used at Optilyz for pricing config, Kubernetes for a side project; no cloud architecture or platform strategy experience
No evidence of director-level IC scope: no strategic customer advisory, no cross-org technical thought leadership, and no published AI research or recognized industry expertise
response.justification: The role's non-negotiable core is recognized AI expertise with demonstrated products and cloud platform strategy — neither is present in this résumé at the required level. AI involvement is limited to two months at re:cinq (MCP tooling), with no prior AI/ML work, no published research, and no AI products shipped at scale. Cloud experience is incidental (AWS CDK in a pricing team context, Kubernetes for a hobby platform), not architectural. The candidate is a capable, senior generalist developer with entrepreneurial instincts and broad stack exposure, which is genuinely valuable — but the gap between a hands-on Staff Engineer and a Director-level AI strategy IC advising strategic customers is significant and not bridgeable by potential alone at this seniority. Score is derived from meeting the tenure floor and showing entrepreneurial signal, offset by misses on the two highest-weight competencies.
